evidence.scientific_clarity: 5-panel workflow (Problem→Pipeline→3 results) conveys retrieval-augmented diffusion concept in <5 sec; headline '2× hit rate' embedded in figure centre; all three paper claims (hit rate, Vina score, convergence) are visually represented.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype=none correctly set; Arial renders for prose text; however DejaVu Sans falls back for math/italic elements (R², x_T noise labels) confirmed by pdffonts; several labels at 6.5–7.5pt violate the brief's ≥9pt minimum.
evidence.palette: Blue (#0F4D92) + orange (#D95F02) main pair is deuteranopia-safe; green (#1B7837) used exclusively for directional gain annotation (+18% bracket); red (#CC2222) confined to miss markers in Panel A with no red/green co-occurrence; ≤4 hues as required.
evidence.layout_density: Gridspec fills 96% of canvas width (left=0.02, right=0.98); 5 panels tile the 2:1 aspect well with no large voids; diffusion-box noise labels (6.5pt, 4 items) are cramped and risk being unreadable at print size.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches all figure panels; headline finding sentence ≤12 words embedded in figure; illustrative disclaimer present; legend in Panel D placed upper-right without overlap; no cross-references; self-contained.
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdffonts confirms CID TrueType fonts, all embedded and subsetted, zero Type-3 bitmap fonts; PDF is genuine vector at 62 KB; script includes pdffonts verification step with Type-3 detection fallback.
evidence.file_format: All four required files present and non-trivial: figure.pdf (62 KB), figure.png (344 KB, 3516×1841 px), caption.tex (472 B), gen_figure.py (17 KB); bonus figure.svg also produced.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states mechanism (ECFP4 retrieval → diffusion decoder) and lists four quantitative findings (2×, +18%, 60%, R²>0.9); includes illustrative disclaimer; slightly verbose for a graphical-abstract one-liner but all claims are specific and numerical.

overall_strengths: Clean 5-panel workflow layout with tight margins and a prominent embedded headline finding satisfies the CNS graphical-abstract pattern; the 2:1 aspect and ≤4-hue palette are fully compliant.
PDF vector fidelity is exemplary: pdf.fonttype=42 enforced, all fonts embedded as CID TrueType with no Type-3 fallback, and the script self-verifies with pdffonts at render time.
overall_weaknesses: Several text elements fall below the brief's 9pt minimum (noise labels at 6.5pt, tick labels at 7pt, legend at 7.5pt), and DejaVu Sans renders for math/italic text instead of Arial — both are typography regressions.
The diffusion-box denoising step labels (x_T … x_1) are decorative rather than informative at their rendered size, consuming panel space without adding scientific content a reviewer could read.
